attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY   
,EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT         
,RU_AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY    
,START_TV_DATETIME             
,START_SSP_DATE                
,BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     
,SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,END_TV_DATETIME               
,END_SSP_DATE                  
,SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT      
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT           
,SS_CD                         
,EDW_CREATE_USER               
,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,ACTION_CODE                   
,DML_TYPE 
,SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV HIST
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
WHERE HIST.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
AND HIST.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE)

SELECT
SMSCANP.SALES_CR_ASGN_NONAPLD_KEY       ,  
SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    ,           
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)		START_TV_DATETIME  ,           
CURRENT_DATE			START_SSP_DATE   ,             
ELSCT.NAME			BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE   ,  
ELSR.SALES_REP_NUMBER		BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER  ,         
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)		END_TV_DATETIME    ,           
CURRENT_DATE			END_SSP_DATE   ,               
EOCLS.SPLIT_PERCENT		SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE  , 
ELST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY	BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,      
EOCLS.LINE_SEQ_ID		SK_LINE_SEQUENCE_ID_LINT  ,    
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE		SS_CODE    ,        
EOCLS.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT  ,
WIORCTLN.ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE                 
FROM
		  $$STGDB.WI_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_NAD WIORCTLN
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CSM_LINE_SALES_CR_AR EOCLS
		 ON (WIORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = EOCLS.SOURCE_LINE_ID			
		 AND WIORCTLN.GLOBAL_NAME = EOCLS.GLOBAL_NAME )
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
		ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WIORCTLN.GLOBAL_NAME)
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_CR_ASGMT_NONAPLD SMSCANP
		ON (SMSCANP.SK_LINE_SEQUENCE_ID_LINT = EOCLS.LINE_SEQ_ID 
		AND SMSCANP.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT = EOCLS.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
		AND SMSCANP.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE )
	INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
		ON (SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = WIORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
		AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ELSCT
		ON (ELSCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = EOCLS.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID
		AND ELSCT.GLOBAL_NAME= EOCLS.GLOBAL_NAME)
	INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ELSR
		ON (ELSR.SALES_REP_ID =  EOCLS.SALESREP_ID 
		AND ELSR.GLOBAL_NAME =  EOCLS.GLOBAL_NAME)
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY ELST	
		ON (ELST.TERRITORY_ID = EOCLS.TERRITORY_ID
		AND ELST.GLOBAL_NAME = EOCLS.GLOBAL_NAME )

SELECT 
WIORCTLN.BATCH_ID,
WIORCTLN.GLOBAL_NAME, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15, 
WIORCTLN.ORG_ID, 
WIORCTLN.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7, 
WIORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
WIORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, 
WIORCTLN.REASON_CODE, 
WIORCTLN.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
WIORCTLN.QUANTITY_CREDITED, 
WIORCTLN.QUANTITY_INVOICED, 
WIORCTLN.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE, 
WIORCTLN.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE, 
WIORCTLN.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, 
WIORCTLN.LINE_TYPE, 
WIORCTLN.RULE_START_DATE, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE1, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6, 
WIORCTLN.EXTENDED_AMOUNT, 
WIORCTLN.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID, 
WIORCTLN.ATTRIBUTE15, 
WIORCTLN.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION, 
WIORCTLN.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG, 
WIORCTLN.CREATED_BY, 
WIORCTLN.DESCRIPTION, 
WIORCTLN.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE13, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE3, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8, 
WIORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9, 
WIORCTLN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
WIORCTLN.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
WIORCTLN.LINE_NUMBER, 
WIORCTLN.PAYMENT_SET_ID, 
WIORCTLN.QUANTITY_ORDERED, 
WIORCTLN.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG, 
WIORCTLN.TAX_PRECEDENCE, 
WIORCTLN.TAX_RATE, 
WIORCTLN.TAXABLE_AMOUNT, 
WIORCTLN.UOM_CODE, 
WIORCTLN.WAREHOUSE_ID,
WIORCTLN.CREATION_DATE,
WIORCTLN.GES_UPDATE_DATE ,
WIORCTLN.CREATE_DATETIME,
WIORCTLN.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_NAD WIORCTLN
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CSM_LINE_SALES_CR_AR EOCLS
	 ON (WIORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = EOCLS.SOURCE_LINE_ID
	 AND WIORCTLN.GLOBAL_NAME = EOCLS.GLOBAL_NAME ) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON( NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WIORCTLN.GLOBAL_NAME)
WHERE 
(
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ELSCT
	WHERE ELSCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = EOCLS.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID
	AND ELSCT.GLOBAL_NAME= EOCLS.GLOBAL_NAME)
OR
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
	WHERE SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = WIORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
	AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY ELST	
	WHERE ELST.TERRITORY_ID = EOCLS.TERRITORY_ID
	AND ELST.GLOBAL_NAME = EOCLS.GLOBAL_NAME  )
OR
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ELSALER
	WHERE ELSALER.SALES_REP_ID =  EOCLS.SALESREP_ID 
	AND ELSALER.GLOBAL_NAME =  EOCLS.GLOBAL_NAME )
/* rchettri :  Q1LSS AR: SM is now loaded from Goldengate as a part of NRT changes. RI on SM has to be removed.
OR 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_CR_ASGMT_NONAPLD SMSCANP
	WHERE  SMSCANP.SK_LINE_SEQUENCE_ID_LINT = EOCLS.LINE_SEQ_ID 
	AND SMSCANP.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
*/
OR NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
	WHERE NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME = WIORCTLN.GLOBAL_NAME ) 
)

SELECT
	SORCTLN.BATCH_ID,
	SORCTLN.GLOBAL_NAME,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15,
	SORCTLN.ORG_ID,
	SORCTLN.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
	SORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
	SORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
	SORCTLN.REASON_CODE,
	SORCTLN.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	SORCTLN.QUANTITY_CREDITED,
	SORCTLN.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
	SORCTLN.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
	SORCTLN.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
	SORCTLN.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
	SORCTLN.LINE_TYPE,
	SORCTLN.RULE_START_DATE,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE1,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6,
	SORCTLN.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
	SORCTLN.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
	SORCTLN.ATTRIBUTE15,
	SORCTLN.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
	SORCTLN.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,
	SORCTLN.CREATED_BY,
	SORCTLN.DESCRIPTION,
	SORCTLN.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE13,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE3,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8,
	SORCTLN.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9,
	SORCTLN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
	SORCTLN.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
	SORCTLN.LINE_NUMBER,
	SORCTLN.PAYMENT_SET_ID,
	SORCTLN.QUANTITY_ORDERED,
	SORCTLN.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG,
	SORCTLN.TAX_PRECEDENCE,
	SORCTLN.TAX_RATE,
	SORCTLN.TAXABLE_AMOUNT,
	SORCTLN.UOM_CODE,
	SORCTLN.WAREHOUSE_ID,
	SORCTLN.CREATION_DATE,
	SORCTLN.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
	SORCTLN.CREATE_DATETIME,
	SORCTLN.ACTION_CODE 
	FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTLN
 WHERE SORCTLN.LINE_TYPE <> 'FREIGHT' AND 
 NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN WIATLOLI
     WHERE 
        WIATLOLI.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL 
      AND  WIATLOLI.ORDER_LINE_ID <>0 
     AND  WIATLOLI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
     AND  WIATLOLI.GLOBAL_NAME = SORCTLN.GLOBAL_NAME
       )
UNION
SELECT
	EORCTLNAD.BATCH_ID,
	EORCTLNAD.GLOBAL_NAME,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15,
	EORCTLNAD.ORG_ID,
	EORCTLNAD.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
	EORCTLNAD.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
	EORCTLNAD.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
	EORCTLNAD.REASON_CODE,
	EORCTLNAD.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	EORCTLNAD.QUANTITY_CREDITED,
	EORCTLNAD.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
	EORCTLNAD.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
	EORCTLNAD.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
	EORCTLNAD.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
	EORCTLNAD.LINE_TYPE,
	EORCTLNAD.RULE_START_DATE,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE1,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6,
	EORCTLNAD.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
	EORCTLNAD.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
	EORCTLNAD.ATTRIBUTE15,
	EORCTLNAD.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION,
	EORCTLNAD.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,
	EORCTLNAD.CREATED_BY,
	EORCTLNAD.DESCRIPTION,
	EORCTLNAD.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE13,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE3,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8,
	EORCTLNAD.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9,
	EORCTLNAD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
	EORCTLNAD.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
	EORCTLNAD.LINE_NUMBER,
	EORCTLNAD.PAYMENT_SET_ID,
	EORCTLNAD.QUANTITY_ORDERED,
	EORCTLNAD.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG,
	EORCTLNAD.TAX_PRECEDENCE,
	EORCTLNAD.TAX_RATE,
	EORCTLNAD.TAXABLE_AMOUNT,
	EORCTLNAD.UOM_CODE,
	EORCTLNAD.WAREHOUSE_ID,
	EORCTLNAD.CREATION_DATE,
	EORCTLNAD.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
	EORCTLNAD.CREATE_DATETIME,
	EORCTLNAD.ACTION_CODE 
	FROM 
	$$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_NAD  EORCTLNAD       
	WHERE
	EORCTLNAD.EXCEPTION_TYPE ='RI'

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, EOCLS.LINE_SEQ_ID) + SMSCANKEY.MAX_VAL SALES_CR_ASGN_NONAPLD_KEY,
EOCLS.LINE_SEQ_ID	SK_LINE_SEQUENCE_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE,
EOCLS.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMSCAN.SALES_CR_ASGN_NONAPLD_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_CR_ASGMT_NONAPLD SMSCAN ) SMSCANKEY,
$$STGDB.WI_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_NAD WIORCTLN
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON( NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WIORCTLN.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CSM_LINE_SALES_CR_AR EOCLS
	 ON (WIORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = EOCLS.SOURCE_LINE_ID
	 AND WIORCTLN.GLOBAL_NAME = EOCLS.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
	ON (SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = WIORCTLN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
	AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ELSCT
	 ON (ELSCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = EOCLS.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID
	AND ELSCT.GLOBAL_NAME= EOCLS.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY ELST
	 ON (ELST.TERRITORY_ID = EOCLS.TERRITORY_ID
	AND ELST.GLOBAL_NAME = EOCLS.GLOBAL_NAME  )
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ELSALER
	ON (ELSALER.SALES_REP_ID =  EOCLS.SALESREP_ID 
	AND ELSALER.GLOBAL_NAME =  EOCLS.GLOBAL_NAME )
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_CR_ASGMT_NONAPLD SMSCANP
	WHERE  SMSCANP.SK_LINE_SEQUENCE_ID_LINT = EOCLS.LINE_SEQ_ID 
	AND COALESCE(SMSCANP.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,0) = EOCLS.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
	AND SMSCANP.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT
HIST.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY          AS   SALES_CR_ASGN_NONAPLD_KEY       ,  
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY      AS   AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    ,           
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                 AS   START_TV_DATETIME  ,           
CURRENT_DATE                         AS   START_SSP_DATE   ,             
HIST.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE       AS   BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,  
HIST.SALES_REP_NUMBER                     AS   BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER  ,         
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                 AS   END_TV_DATETIME    ,           
CURRENT_DATE                         AS   END_SSP_DATE   ,               
HIST.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT        AS   SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE  , 
HIST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY             AS   BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,      
HIST.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT              AS   SK_LINE_SEQUENCE_ID_LINT  ,    
HIST.SS_CD , 
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0), 
HIST.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,         
'I'  AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV HIST
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON HIST.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
AND HIST.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE
UNION ALL
SELECT
HIST.SALES_CREDIT_ASSIGNMENT_KEY          AS   SALES_CR_ASGN_NONAPLD_KEY       ,  
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY      AS   AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    ,           
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                 AS   START_TV_DATETIME  ,           
CURRENT_DATE                         AS   START_SSP_DATE   ,             
HIST.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE       AS   BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,  
HIST.SALES_REP_NUMBER                     AS   BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER  ,         
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                 AS   END_TV_DATETIME    ,           
CURRENT_DATE                         AS   END_SSP_DATE   ,               
HIST.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT        AS   SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE  , 
HIST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY             AS   BK_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,      
HIST.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT              AS   SK_LINE_SEQUENCE_ID_LINT  ,    
HIST.SS_CD , 
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),       
HIST.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT, 
'I'  AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE 
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_NAD HIST
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON HIST.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
AND HIST.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE
